overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night. The player moves past a crashed graffiti-covered vehicle, ascends neon-lit stairs through a covered plaza, and approaches a character with cybernetic eye implants near wrecked cars beneath a large 'PRIDE OF SIN' neon sign.

events.description: pedestrian in green shirt passes quickly in front of camera from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking slowly around the crashed vehicle, observing the colorful graffiti and surrounding characters

notable_agents.action: character in pink and white jacket standing near rubble, looking toward the crashed vehicle

entered.detail: large crashed vehicle covered in colorful neon graffiti and street art
industrial building facade with large white skull mural painted on metal siding
scattered concrete chunks and wreckage surrounding the crash site
linear fluorescent light fixtures embedded in the ceiling structure

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a rain-slicked, semi-covered urban area dominated by a massive crashed vehicle covered in vibrant graffiti. The camera moves around the wreckage, passing a character in a pink jacket, while a building with a distinctive skull mural looms in the background. A pedestrian briefly crosses the frame as the camera continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway entrance with security checkpoint

events.description: moves past the crashed vehicle area into a covered walkway with uniformed personnel
passes the group of uniformed characters and continues toward the stairway

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the covered area, passing a group of security personnel standing near the wall

notable_agents.action: group of three security guards in red uniforms standing near the skull mural building, one gesturing with weapon

entered.detail: elongated corridor with overhead lighting leading to stairs and upper levels
wide staircase ascending to upper plaza level

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the open crash site into a narrower covered walkway, passing a group of three security guards in red uniforms standing by the skull mural. The environment transitions to a more enclosed space with wet concrete floors reflecting the overhead lights, approaching a stairway leading upward.

events.description: begins ascending the concrete stairs toward the upper plaza level
large neon sign 'PRIDE OF SIN' becomes visible through the palm trees

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete staircase, moving from the covered lower area toward the open plaza above

entered.detail: tropical palm trees lining the stairway approach
large pink neon sign with retro styling mounted on distant building
tall glass and steel building with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a long concrete staircase under a covered walkway with linear ceiling lights. Palm trees become visible on the left, and a large pink neon sign reading 'PRIDE OF SIN' emerges in the distance. The environment transitions from enclosed to more open as the camera climbs toward the upper plaza.

events.description: reaches the top of the stairs and enters the open plaza area
turns slightly right and descends toward the street level with bollards

agents.ego_description: walking across the plaza, passing characters standing near the stairs, then moving toward the street

notable_agents.action: woman with bright green leg warmers and man looking up at the sky, standing near the stair railing

entered.detail: open paved area at the top of the stairs with seating ledges
short black and yellow posts lining the edge of the walkway
wrecked cars scattered across the lower street level

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs into an open plaza, the camera passes a woman with neon green leg warmers and a man looking upward. The 'PRIDE OF SIN' sign is now closer and more prominent. The camera moves past bollards toward the street level where wrecked cars are visible, transitioning from the elevated walkway to the main street.

scene_state.functional_zone: street level with neon signage and wreckage

events.description: slows down and approaches a character standing by the wrecked silver car
character with glowing cybernetic eyes turns to face the camera directly

agents.ego_description: approaching a character with distinctive cybernetic enhancements, stopping to face them

notable_agents.action: character with glowing blue cybernetic eyes and facial implants standing beside a crashed car, turning to face the player

entered.detail: wrecked silver sedan with open doors and damaged frame
rain-soaked asphalt reflecting the pink neon lights from the sign above

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches street level dominated by the massive 'PRIDE OF SIN' neon sign glowing pink against the night. Moving past wrecked cars on the wet asphalt, the camera approaches a character with glowing blue cybernetic eyes standing beside a crashed silver sedan. The character turns to face the camera as the scene ends with a close-up of their illuminated eyes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk district, moving from a graffiti-strewn crash site up through a covered transit area and back down to a neon-lit street. It begins by weaving around a massive, graffiti-covered wreckage and a character in a pink jacket, passing a skull mural as the space narrows into a covered walkway guarded by security personnel. The camera then ascends a long concrete staircase under linear ceiling lights, where the environment opens up to reveal palm trees and the distant glow of a pink neon sign. As the camera emerges into an elevated plaza, it passes several pedestrians before descending from the walkway toward the wet asphalt of the main street. Finally, the scene culminates beneath the towering Pride of Sin sign, moving past wrecked cars to a close-up of a character with glowing blue cybernetic eyes.
